top_findings.title: ATDD prompt not followed: no failing-first, atomic, independent acceptance tests
top_findings.evidence: prompt=ATDD required client-perspective acceptance tests that are atomic/independent and each start from an empty service. simple_test.py:13 is one monolithic test_api() that runs create->list->get->update->delete sharing a single book with no per-scenario reset; verify_implementation.py:68 verify_requirements() greps app.py source and always returns True (asserts on HOW, not behavior). No red/green or tests-first evidence.
top_findings.suggestion: Split into independent HTTP-level acceptance scenarios (one per requirement), each resetting to an empty store; delete the grep-based verifier which is not a behavioral test.
